category_sources: source_facts.description says lightweight wiki engine with hierarchy support; official homepage https://mycorrhiza.wiki/ describes a free and open-source wiki engine for personal wikis, digital gardens, and small teams.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://mycorrhiza.wiki/ uses the title Mycorrhiza Wiki.
docs_sources: Official help page https://mycorrhiza.wiki/help says it is documentation for Mycorrhiza Wiki; homepage links the deployment guide and project resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/bouncepaw/mycorrhiza, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a wiki engine, file/Git-backed storage, personal wikis, digital gardens, and quick-start CLI usage.
